# programs.topgrade

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.topgrade`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.topgrade.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable topgrade. |
| `programs.topgrade.package` | `package` | The topgrade package to use. |
| `programs.topgrade.settings` | `TOML value` | Configuration written to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/topgrade.toml`. See <https://github.com/r-darwish/topgrade/wiki/Step-list> for the full list of options. |
